concept: Emblema de alerta de timer/fusível com anel segmentado âmbar, centelha ciano, chevrons pulsantes e flash central.
selectionRationale: Feedback de HUD específico para o ritmo de bomba PvP, sem repetir os candidatos de confirmação, captura ou streak; não contém dígitos gerados e permanece legível como overlay pequeno.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 2D sprite-sheet source for a short Bomba PvP HUD animation. Primary request: create a coherent 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 sequential frames of a compact bomb fuse timer warning emblem for HUD overlay: a centered amber-orange circular timer ring around a small cyan fuse spark, three short warning chevrons that pulse outward, an escalating orange-white flash near the middle, then a clean contraction back to the calm ring. Every cell must contain exactly one centered frame with generous padding and identical framing, crisp readable pixel-art VFX silhouette, no numerals, no letters, no text and no interface panel. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no shadow, no gradient, no texture, no floor. Subject: isolated timer warning emblem designed to sit over gameplay HUD. Style/medium: crisp high-resolution pixel-art game UI effect with limited amber-orange, cyan, white and deep-navy accents, hard edges with restrained glow. Composition/framing: square 4x4 grid, row-major temporal order, centered emblem in each cell, consistent scale, 16 distinct smoothly progressing frames. Lighting/mood: urgent but legible competitive-game warning. Color palette: amber, orange, cyan-blue, white highlight, navy accents; never use magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: luminous segmented ring and tiny pixel sparks. Constraints: keep the chroma-key background perfectly uniform; preserve a full transparent-safe margin around every frame; no text, logos, watermark, characters, bomb body, smoke, fire, scenery or extra UI. Avoid: fake digits, inconsistent framing, duplicate frames, cut-off rings, empty cells and nonuniform backgrounds.

source.resolutionNote: A geração entregue pelo image_gen é nativa em 1254x1254; source-upscaled-2048.png é somente um derivado ampliado e não uma fonte nativa 2048px.

pipeline.alphaProcessing: Helper remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key de borda, soft matte, despill e edge-contract 1; depois recorte interno de 40px e extensão transparente centralizada para impedir contato com as bordas.

grok.requestedTask: Conferir a grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas.
grok.result: Invoke-GrokWorker.ps1 retornou exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não criou arquivos.

pipeline.fallback: Extração, atlases, contact sheet, GIF e validação concluídos localmente com ImageMagick após a remoção de halo pelo helper.

validation.visualInspection: Contact sheet inspecionado após a remoção de chroma-key; anel, chevrons, centelha e flash central permanecem limpos e legíveis, sem halo magenta observável.

license: Visual gerado nesta thread; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
